name: Urgent Job Auto Status
script:
if doc.priority == "Urgent" and doc.status == "Draft":
    doc.status = "Pending Diagnosis"

name: get_quick_stats
QuickFix Heartbeat
script:
import frappe

frappe.get_doc({
    "doctype": "Audit Logs",
    "doctype_name": "Server Script",
    "document_name": "QuickFix Heartbeat",
    "action": "Scheduler Heartbeat",
    "user": "Administrator"
}).insert()
